subcodes.first_line: O peoples of the earth! The Mother Book crieth out in the final abode: How is it that ye hear not? Verily, We have sent down the Qur'an [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ملا الارض ام الکتاب ینادی فی الماب کیف انتم لاتسمعون قد بعثنا الفرقان علی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God
